errors.description: Required revocation preflight evidence is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until the response is bound to a valid preflight

errors.description: Required signed bundle LTV evidence linkage is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until LTV evidence continuity is proven

errors.description: OCSP or CRL response source metadata does not match the preflight.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification on source mismatch

errors.description: Revocation response status is UNKNOWN or not GOOD.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification unless status is GOOD

errors.description: Revocation response reports the certificate as revoked.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification when revocation is reported

errors.description: Revocation response freshness bounds are stale.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until thisUpdate and nextUpdate prove freshness

errors.description: Revocation response thisUpdate, nextUpdate, or checked-at timestamp is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until timestamp ordering is deterministic

errors.description: Responder key or response signature fingerprint is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until signed response metadata is canonical

errors.description: Revocation response nonce hash does not match the preflight challenge binding.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification on nonce mismatch

errors.description: Revocation response hash binding does not match canonical metadata.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until all response fields match

errors.description: A previously observed revocation response record was reused.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification on replayed response evidence

errors.description: Revocation response diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny revocation response verification until diagnostics are redacted and audit-safe
